title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.530 - Special election — how called and conducted
text:
262.530.  Special election — how called and conducted. — Special election shall be called, advertised and conducted, as in the case of a special election to vote bonds for the erection of a county courthouse or other public purpose.
(RSMo 1939 § 14188) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12511
